name: chain-of-thought
title: Chain Of Thought
description: A collapsible component that visualizes AI reasoning steps with support for search results, images, and step-by-step progress indicators.

name: checkpoint
title: Checkpoint
description: A compact checkpoint component that pairs a separator with icon and trigger helpers for workflow checkpoints.

name: confirmation
title: Confirmation
description: A confirmation workflow component for tool approval states, request and response rendering, and action handling.

name: context
title: Context
description: A hover-card-based context window usage component with token, cost, and model usage breakdowns.

name: conversation
title: Conversation
description: A sticky-bottom conversation container with empty state and scroll-to-bottom controls for chat interfaces.

name: image
title: Image
description: A data-URL image component with typed props for AI-generated image payloads.

name: loader
title: Loader
description: A lightweight animated loader with a separate icon component.

name: message
title: Message
description: A full chat message system with branching, attachments, actions, and markdown streaming responses.

name: model-selector
title: Model Selector
description: A searchable model selector dialog built on command and dialog primitives.

name: open-in-chat
title: Open In Chat
description: A provider menu for opening prompts in external chat and AI tools.

name: plan
title: Plan
description: A plan card component with collapsible content and streaming-aware description shimmer.

name: inline-citation
title: Inline Citation
description: An inline citation system with hover cards and carousel views for source-backed AI content.

name: prompt-input
title: Prompt Input
description: A composable prompt input surface with attachments, action menus, and provider-driven text handling.

name: queue
title: Queue
description: A structured queue view with sections, items, attachments, and action controls.

name: reasoning
title: Reasoning
description: A collapsible reasoning block that tracks streaming duration and renders a markdown response.

name: response
title: Response
description: A markdown response renderer for streamed AI content.

name: shimmer
title: Shimmer
description: A text shimmer utility component with configurable spread and duration.

name: sources
title: Sources
description: A collapsible sources list for rendering cited links and source groups.

name: suggestion
title: Suggestion
description: A compact suggestion button set for displaying prompt ideas and quick actions.

name: task
title: Task
description: A collapsible task panel for tracking task state and nested task items.

name: tool
title: Tool
description: A collapsible tool call block with parameter and result rendering.

name: code
title: Code
description: A syntax-highlighted code block with overflow handling and a copy action.

name: copy-button
title: Copy Button
description: A clipboard-driven button with success and failure states.

name: web-preview
title: Web Preview
description: A browser-style preview frame with navigation controls and a log console.
